storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the accidental destruction of the Wicked Witch of the East via house landing. The scene must visually communicate the scale difference between Dorothy and the Munchkins while transitioning from the shock of a heavy impact to the communal triumph of a liberated people.

## Required Cast
- dorothy (young human girl, weary traveler appearance)
- toto (dog)
- munchkins (small population)

## Required Environments
- The site of the house landing (lush country, colorful flowers, fruit-bearing trees)

## Continuity Constraints
- Position of the house relative to characters
- Scale difference between Dorothy and the Munchkins

## Beat List
- BT001: Dorothy discovers the house impact
- BT002: Investigation of the figure/Reveal of the Witch
- BT003: Realization and Munchkin celebration
